data.title: NFL Games Set Thanksgiving Day Records: Why This Is Good And Bad News For Streaming Giant Netflix
data.description: Netflix will stream two NFL games on Christmas. Based on viewership records set by the league on Thanksgiving and Black Friday, Netflix is likely to see strong interest.

data.title: Police Can Search Cars For Raw Cannabis Smell, Illinois Supreme Court Says
data.description: Illinois Supreme Court rules police can search vehicles based on the smell of raw cannabis, raising privacy concerns and calls for legal clarity.

data.title: NFL Eases Marijuana Rules: Is Full Legalization In The Game Plan?
data.description: The NFL's latest policy change could signal a shift in the league's stance on marijuana use. Discover the details of what's changing.

data.title: AOC Challenges Musk's DOGE Agenda, Slams 'Defund The ACLU' Call By Trump's Efficiency Czar
data.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-N.Y.), a prominent political figure, has responded to Elon Musk’s call for defunding the American Civil Liberties Union. In a social media post on Thursday, she also attacked proposed cuts by the Musk-headed Department of Government Efficiency.

data.title: Uber Will Deliver Your Christmas Tree And In Some Cities Bring Carolers To Houses
data.description: Part gimmick, part marketing for new services, Uber is tackling the holiday season with Christmas tree delivery and carolers.
